title: Unified Trace Receipt
description: A unified receipt envelope that binds AI Search Trace Receipt, Source Contribution Graph, and Royalty Hook references while preserving module boundaries and preventing raw content capture, automatic payment, legal attribution, or ownership assignment.

schema_version.description: The schema version of this Unified Trace Receipt.

unified_receipt_id.description: A non-reversible identifier for this unified trace receipt.

receipt_type.description: The type of unified trace receipt.

module_refs.description: References to the trace modules bound by this unified receipt. The modules remain independently validated and are not merged into raw content.

ai_search_trace_receipt.description: Reference to the AI Search Trace Receipt module.

trace_id.description: Identifier of the referenced AI Search Trace Receipt.

receipt_hash.description: Integrity hash of the referenced AI Search Trace Receipt.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the referenced AI Search Trace Receipt.

source_contribution_graph.description: Reference to the Source Contribution Graph module.

graph_id.description: Identifier of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

graph_hash.description: Integrity hash of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

royalty_hook.description: Reference to the Royalty Hook module.

hook_id.description: Identifier of the referenced Royalty Hook.

hook_hash.description: Integrity hash of the referenced Royalty Hook.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the referenced Royalty Hook.

module_relationships.description: Relationship metadata describing how the referenced modules are linked while preserving their boundaries.

relationship_type.description: The broad relationship pattern between referenced modules.

linkage_status.description: Current linkage status of the referenced modules.

event_binding.description: Metadata describing how the referenced modules are bound to the same event or review chain.

shared_event_fingerprint.description: A non-reversible fingerprint indicating shared event lineage across modules.

binding_method.description: The method used to bind the modules together.

binding_confidence.description: Broad confidence level that the referenced modules belong to the same trace chain.

boundary_preservation.description: Declarations that module boundaries remain preserved in the unified receipt.

modules_remain_separate.description: Must be true. The unified receipt binds module references but does not merge the modules into one raw record.

raw_content_not_merged.description: Must be true. Raw query, answer, and source content must not be merged into the unified receipt.

payment_not_executed.description: Must be true. The unified receipt must not execute payment.

legal_attribution_not_decided.description: Must be true. The unified receipt must not decide legal attribution.

ownership_not_assigned.description: Must be true. The unified receipt must not assign ownership.

unified_policy_boundary.description: Unified safety and privacy boundary for the bound trace modules.

raw_query_stored.description: Must be false. Raw user queries must not be stored inside the unified receipt.

raw_answer_stored.description: Must be false. Raw AI answers must not be stored inside the unified receipt.

raw_source_content_stored.description: Must be false. Raw source content must not be stored inside the unified receipt.

personal_id_linked.description: Must be false. The unified receipt must not directly link to personal identifiers.

payment_decision_included.description: Must be false. The unified receipt must not include a payment decision.

legal_attribution_included.description: Must be false. The unified receipt must not include a legal attribution decision.

ownership_decision_included.description: Must be false. The unified receipt must not include an ownership decision.

automatic_execution_allowed.description: Must be false. The unified receipt must not authorize automatic payment, contract execution, ownership assignment, or legal attribution.

verification_status.description: Verification status for the unified receipt and referenced modules.

receipt_verified.description: Whether the unified receipt itself has been verified.

module_refs_verified.description: Whether referenced module identifiers and hashes have been verified.

integrity_chain_verified.description: Whether the integrity chain has been verified.

verification_level.description: Broad verification level for this unified receipt.

verification_notes.description: Optional minimized notes about verification status. Must not contain raw query, answer, or source content.

integrity_chain.description: Integrity chain metadata for the unified receipt and referenced modules.

unified_receipt_hash.description: Hash of this Unified Trace Receipt.

previous_unified_receipt_hash.description: Optional hash of a previous Unified Trace Receipt for chained integrity.

ai_search_trace_receipt_hash.description: Hash of the referenced AI Search Trace Receipt.

source_contribution_graph_hash.description: Hash of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

royalty_hook_hash.description: Hash of the referenced Royalty Hook.

chain_method.description: Method used to establish the integrity chain.

signature.description: Optional signature for unified receipt verification.
